title: Fex's Vehicle & Transportation Mod
description: Vast addon-pack based content and vehicle mod.
body:
FVTM is a pack based mod, with which you can add content to the game without any Java knowledge!
All with fairly simple config files. Among other you can create:
- vehicles, drive-able vehicles (land and rail, other types wip)
- parts, to customize your vehicles
  - wheels in varying sizes and with varying terrain attributes
- materials, generic items which you can use in recipes
- consumables, custom food and drinks
- blocks, basic blocks, rotated blocks, animated blocks, blocks with functions, blocks with inventories
- multi-blocks, customizable machines
- clothes, custom wearable armor items

Supported Model Formats:
- JSON (only for blocks and items)
- OBJ (including blocks and clothes!)
- FMF (model format exported from [FMT](https://fexcraft.net/app/fmt))
- SMP Toolbox models (uncompiled!)

Other Cool Features:
- legendary road tool [(see YouTube video)](https://youtu.be/dcTobZsyUIY) [or bilibili](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Zd4y1h71f)

### Content and Pack availability!
Depending on Minecraft version, not all features may be available to the same extent.    
**Packs are version neutral. You can use FVTM v4 packs on any version FVTM v4 is available on!**    
But unless a pack for example was specifically updated for 1.21, you may experience things like missing item icons.

## Packs
[There's a list in there wiki over here.](https://fexcraft.net/wiki/mod/fvtm/known-packs)

## Discord    
https://discord.gg/AkMAzaA    

## Videos (v4) 1.12 / 1.20 / 1.21

- [Part / Wheel install and removal in V4](https://youtu.be/VUQuMcoTXHc) || [bilibili](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Vs421T7wz/)
- Note there's no constructor block in V4 Like there was in V3!
- [Making a vehicle using an OBJ Model](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2AY5DCekXFI&feature=youtu.be) || [bilibili](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1WUHXevENu/)
- [Decoration Creation & Use](https://youtu.be/r6oNB5NdcmQ) || [bilibili](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Qot4eoEE7)
